# remscontent_workflow (Data Source)

Workflow data source.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "remscontent_workflow" "example" {
  title = "Workflow ABCDE"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `title` (String) The title of the workflow to look up. If multiple workflows have the same title, an error is returned.

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) The workflow ID
